header.title: Dashboard
header.subtitle: Funnel KPIs and live activity across the R.E.A.N. sequence

loadError.title: Could not load your account
loadError.body: Your session may have expired or the account is no longer available. Sign out and log in again.

empty.title: No pipeline activity yet
empty.body: Booked meetings will chart here, week by week, as your campaigns land calls.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Campaign launches and booked meetings show up here as they happen.

empty.title: No conversion data yet
empty.body: Launch a campaign and book a meeting to see the Reach → Engage → Activate → Nurture funnel.

footnote: Every figure above is read live from operational data: Reach and Engaged from campaigns, Activated and Nurtured from synced meetings. Week-over-week deltas are deliberately not shown until the Arsenal logs historical metrics to the ERP — they are omitted rather than fabricated.
